title: Add retry with backoff for transcript API rate limits
changeRequest: When YouTubeTranscriptIo returns HTTP 429, retry the request with exponential backoff instead of immediately failing.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Requests returning HTTP 429 are retried up to 3 times
After 3 failed retries, the original 429 error propagates to caller
Each retry attempt is logged at Warning level with attempt count

scopeBoundary: Changes limited to YouTubeTranscriptIo integration module
outOfScope: Retry logic for other integration modules

decisionLog.rationale: User confirmed configurability not needed at this stage
Standard pattern for rate limit handling, avoids thundering herd
Info too noisy for normal operation, Error reserved for actual failures
